buildCommand: cd shinobij.client && npm ci && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.sentry.io https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://*.ingest.us.sentry.io; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://*.sentry.io https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://*.ingest.us.sentry.io https://api.openai.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
